basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Warangal has released the official notification for 1 Research Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH/Female candidates will be given as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Production Engineering/Metallurgy with first class, ME/M.Tech in Production Engineering/Manufacturing Engineering/Industrial Engineering/Additive Manufacturing/Material Science/CIM/CAD-CAM or equivalent with first class, Ph.D in Mechanical Engineering/Metallurgy (Allied branches related to project can also apply), Minimum 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA at UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL; 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Production Engineering/Metallurgy with first class. ME/M.Tech in Production Engineering/Manufacturing Engineering/Industrial Engineering/Additive Manufacturing/Material Science/CIM/CAD-CAM or equivalent with first class. Ph.D in Mechanical Engineering/Metallurgy is Mandatory (Allied branches related to project can also apply). Minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL. Minimum 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate-I position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate-I position at NIT Warangal is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or allied fields with first class, and an ME/M.Tech in relevant specializations with first class. A Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering or Metallurgy is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I position is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH/Female candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and self-attested copies of relevant documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal), specifically for the Mechanical Engineering department.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.
